final:
module alu (
    input wire [7:0] a,
    input wire [7:0] b,
    input wire [1:0] ctrl,
    output reg [7:0] result
    );

always @(*) begin
    case (ctrl)
        2'b00: result = a & b; // AND
        2'b01: result = a | b; // OR
        2'b10: result = a + b; // ADD
        2'b11: result = a - b; // SUB
        default: result = 8'b0;
    endcase
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result = ~a & ~b; // NAND
      result = ~a | ~b; // NOR
      result = ~a + ~b; // Subtraction with negated operands
      result = ~a - ~b; // Addition with negated operands
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
result = ~a & ~b; // NAND
result = ~a | ~b; // NOR
result = ~a + ~b; // Subtraction with negated operands
result = ~a - ~b; // Addition with negated operands
